privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic docker project located at `/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/webapp`. The required environment variables to set are `FLASK_DEBUG=1` and `FLASK_ENV=development`. The required ports for the api and db are 5678 and 5432 respectively. The required bind mount destination is `/app`. The required command override must contain `flask run`.
